/bin/zsh -lc "python - <<'PY'
from pathlib import Path
from tempfile import TemporaryDirectory

from sqlalchemy import select

from backend.tests.test_story_tools import (
    _build_session_factory,
    _build_test_object_storage,
    _seed_story_setup_session,
)
from app.models import AssetKind, CompositionJob, SessionAsset
from app.services.story_tools import StoryWorkflowToolName, StoryWorkflowToolService
from app.worker.default_handlers import build_default_job_handler_registry
from app.worker.service import JobWorker
from datetime import timedelta

with TemporaryDirectory() as tmp:
    fake_gcs, client, object_storage = _build_test_object_storage()
    session_factory = _build_session_factory(Path(tmp))
    try:
        with session_factory() as session:
            seeded = _seed_story_setup_session(session)
            result = StoryWorkflowToolService(session).execute(
                tool_name=StoryWorkflowToolName.COMPOSE_NEXT_SEGMENT,
                session_id=seeded[\"session_id\"],
                arguments={},
            )
            job_id = result.composition_job_id

        worker = JobWorker(
            session_factory=session_factory,
            registry=build_default_job_handler_registry(object_storage=object_storage),
            worker_id=\"evaluation-worker\",
            lease_duration=timedelta(seconds=30),
            poll_interval_seconds=0.01,
        )
        while worker.run_once():
            pass

        with session_factory() as session:
            asset = session.execute(
                select(SessionAsset).where(
                    SessionAsset.composition_job_id == job_id,
                    SessionAsset.asset_kind == AssetKind.STORY_TEXT,
                )
            ).scalar_one()
            job = session.get(CompositionJob, job_id)
            print({
                \"job_status\": job.status.value,
                \"progress_percent\": job.progress_percent,
                \"criteria\": asset.metadata_json.get(\"evaluation\", []),
            })
    finally:
        object_storage.close()
        client.close()
PY"
